Operation 'listRemoteJobs' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original description lacks specificity about what filters are available, the response structure, and pagination behavior. Added clarity about the JobListResponse schema, specific filterable fields (industry, tag, location, job type, count), and that parameters are optional. Enhanced summary to be more action-oriented. These improvements help AI agents understand exactly what data they can filter on and what structure to expect in responses.

data.current_description: Returns a list of remote job listings, optionally filtered by count, industry, tag, location, and other criteria.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a paginated list of remote job listings from the Jobicy database. Supports filtering by industry, tag, location, job type, and result count. Returns a JobListResponse object containing an array of Job objects with details including title, company, industry, type, location, and job description. All parameters are optional - omitting filters returns all available jobs.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks specificity about what filters are available, the response structure, and pagination behavior. Added clarity about the JobListResponse schema, specific filterable fields (industry, tag, location, job type, count), and that parameters are optional. Enhanced summary to be more action-oriented.
